DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: ERIK A. RAPOPORT, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, CCSF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER COMPELLING KAISER TO PRODUCE ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S PSYCHIATRIC RECORDS BY NOVEMBER 16, 2004, AND AS IT SEEKS TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND A FINAL DAY OF DEPOSITION AFTER THE PRODUCTION OF HIS PSYCHIATRIC RECORDS. THE COURT FINDS NO LEGAL SUPPORT FOR AN ORDER WHICH WOULD COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO SIGN A RELEASE. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
